message:
🐛 Fix token subcategory tracking and add custom missions (#614)

Token Subcategory Fixes:
- Fix bug where byCategory changes weren't triggering UI updates
- Add byCategory to change detection in updateSharedUsage
- Persist category data to localStorage for page refresh survival
- Clear category data when resetting usage

Custom Mission Feature:
- Add "New Mission" button to AI Missions sidebar header
- Support starting custom missions with any prompt
- Show expanded input form for creating custom missions
- Add "Start Custom Mission" CTA when no missions exist

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
